title: Window function + aggregates + correlated subquery in one query
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.ranked_posts_with_comment_totals/0` that returns each post with: (1) a `rank` computed by `row_number() |> over(partition_by: p.category_id, order_by: [desc: p.view_count])`, (2) a correlated subquery column `comment_count` using `parent_as(:post).id`, (3) filtered to posts in the top-3 per category. Uses named binding `:post` on the outer query. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Window + correlated subquery + filter by window result. Multi-feature synthesis.
